rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from BBID. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (5,000 x 35%). Applied to 2025 because the drop occurred on or after the 2024 FreeAgent auction start (2024-07-27). Waiver salary basis taken from preceding BBID add salary of 5,000. Review only: post-auction carryover row is using local fallback contract inference instead of a live salaryAdjustments drop marker. Live salaryAdjustments feed was unavailable for this build.
